HGSS.571.0000:
You came from Olivine?\f
Do you remember the four islands
along the way?\f
I heard that a mythical sea creature is
hiding in them.
HGSS.571.0001:
I heard that you can only see it if
you have a Silver Wing.\f
It must have the same scent as
the creature.
HGSS.571.0002:
I’ve heard that the whirlpools around
the islands are caused by the\r
sea creature.\f
You might need a special move to
get past them.
